g.text: Edge Case: Empty Input (no rows match WHERE)
3 non-NULL values (100,200,300) | 2 NULL values | 5 rows total
Function | Counts NULLs | Result | Return Type
KEY: AVG denominator = COUNT(col) = 3, not COUNT(*) = 5
COUNT(*) => 0 not NULL — COUNT is special
COUNT(bonus) => 0 not NULL — COUNT is special
SUM(bonus) => NULL not 0 — no values to sum
MIN(bonus) => NULL not 0 — no values seen
MAX(bonus) => NULL not 0 — no values seen
COUNT alone returns 0 for empty input — all others return NULL
